project_type: Full-stack AI productivity app - Next.js 15 frontend with Three.js particle entity, Python FastAPI backend with Vertex AI agents and MCP server integrations
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip for backend
test_framework: Jest with jsdom for frontend (jest --passWithNoTests), pytest for backend
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build in frontend/ to confirm compilation. Backend changes are Python-only with logging additions so type/syntax verification is sufficient.
setup_instructions: Frontend: cd frontend && pnpm install. Backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. pnpm is available. Node.js is available. Python is available. No backend server running for integration tests, verify via build/lint only.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns and file conventions.
key_patterns: Backend agents inherit AgentBase, implement execute(task: dict) -> dict. Frontend uses Next.js app router, React Three Fiber for 3D, raw GLSL shaders loaded via raw-loader, TailwindCSS for styling with custom dark/neon theme, next-auth for authentication, WebSocket for real-time chat. Shaders use uniforms (uTime, uMouse, uAudioFrequency, uAudioBass, uAudioTreble) and attributes (aRandom, aPhase).
directory_structure: ChronAI/backend/app/agents/ - agent implementations (orchestrator, scheduler, planner, etc.). ChronAI/backend/app/mcp/ - MCP client for tool calls. ChronAI/frontend/app/ - Next.js app router pages. ChronAI/frontend/components/entity/ - Three.js particle system. ChronAI/frontend/components/chat/ - Chat UI. ChronAI/frontend/lib/ - Utilities (ws, voice). ChronAI/frontend/types/ - TypeScript declarations (glsl.d.ts).
